# Introduction

This book documents the context and progression of work around creating a discrete event simulation (DES) of an air ambulance service.

## Aim

The primary aim of this project is to develop a high-quality, future proofed computer-based simulation model for HEMS Operations to optimise utilisation of DAA resources.

It is intended to provide decision **support**, allowing certain aspects of decisions around the design and resourcing of air ambulance services to be explored.
